Metadata.title: Agos — Real-time Salary Streaming
Metadata.description: Stream salaries per-second on Stellar in XLM or USDC. Withdraw what you've earned, anytime.

Hero.title:
Pay contractors
per second.
Hero.subtitle: Agos streams salaries in real time on Stellar — native XLM by default, USDC optional. Recipients withdraw earned amounts anytime. No batch payroll friction.

Dashboard.subtitle: Manage your salary streams
Dashboard.noStreamsHint: Create your first salary stream to start paying contractors per-second.

Stream.title: Stream Details
Stream.cancelHint: Unearned funds will be returned to the employer.

Connect.title: Connect a wallet
Connect.subtitle: Connect your Freighter wallet to manage salary streams.
Connect.installFreighter: Freighter extension is required to continue.
